Good
Recovery 62 • Sleep 71 • Strain 69%

Read
Recovery is stronger than recent days, while output has run lighter than usual and the day has only drawn a moderate amount from the tank. The open window favors measured resistance work, with protein nearly carrying its share and the remaining deficit worth keeping gentle for muscle retention.

Strong, not spent.
